description_long: This object is a sleek, rectangular mobile phone with a black front face dominated by a glass touchscreen display. The front features a single circular home button below the screen and a small front-facing camera above. The back is metallic gray with a prominent silver Apple logo centered near the top and a black strip at the top and bottom. The rear also includes a small camera lens and flash in the upper left corner. The sides are flat and black, with visible physical buttons for volume and power. The device is slim and compact, typical of early-generation smartphones.
description: A slim, rectangular smartphone with a black glass front, metallic gray back, and visible Apple branding. Features a touchscreen, home button, and side buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black glass touchscreen, home button, and app icons on the display.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the slim profile and two circular side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view revealing the metallic gray surface, silver Apple logo, and rear camera with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the slim profile and a single button near the top.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, visually prominent against the metallic gray surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a typical iOS home screen with app icons arranged in a grid, a wallpaper of a snowy mountain landscape, and status bar elements at the top.
attribute_camera_placement: One small camera lens and flash are located in the top left corner on the back of the device; a small front-facing camera is centered above the screen.
attribute_button_layout: Two circular buttons are on the left edge (volume up/down), one rectangular button is on the right edge (power/lock), and a circular home button is below the screen on the front.
